hero.description1: For individuals who want real skills.
hero.description2: For companies who need reliable workers.
hero.description3: REAL BUILDER transforms beginners into skilled, certified builders - fully equipped, job-ready to raise the standard from day one.

about.description: WE BUILD THE NEW GENERATION WORKFORCE THAT THE WORLD CONSTRUCTION INDUSTRY IS MISSING. BY RAISING THE VALUE AND STANDARDS OF BUILDERS WE MEET THE GLOBAL DEMAND FOR SKILLED MANPOWER.
about.subtitle: BECOME MORE & EARN MORE!

aboutUs.title: ABOUT REAL BUILDER
aboutUs.p1: To become a Real Builder is more than a profession.
aboutUs.p2: It is a mindset. A statement. A way of life.
aboutUs.p3: Real Builder is about taking your career, your income, and your personal standards to the next level.
aboutUs.p4: To earn more, you must become more.
aboutUs.p5: This is your opportunity to unlock your real potential — starting tomorrow — and build a stronger future.
aboutUs.p6: By joining Real Builder, you become part of something that has never existed before:
aboutUs.p7: A new generation of construction professionals.
aboutUs.p8: Intelligent. Business-minded. Physically strong. Mentally sharp.
aboutUs.p9: You are not just a worker.
aboutUs.p11: Real Builder is a new standard of personality.

howItWorks.subtitle: From Base experience to certified professional. Faster than you can imagine.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up and tell us about your background and goals. We'll match you with the right training path.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Participate in high-intensity, on-site learning in Portuguese or English. From safety fundamentals to specialized techniques.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Weekend hands-on training (Fri-Sun) with real tools and experienced professionals.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Earn your RB1 Certificate after 1-4 weekends of training. Your first milestone to a professional career!
howItWorks.step5Desc: Get your fully equipped vehicle to start working as a professional builder.

courses.title: COURSES
courses.subtitle: Master specialized skills in high-demand construction trades. All courses include theory, practice, and certification.
